'''gazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:taintlessly|taintlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taintlessly|taintlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gazate|gazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gazatesher|gazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazatesherĂ«m|gazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazatero|gazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gazateshĂ«|gazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazateshĂ«m|gazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazatero|gokigazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigazateshĂ«|gokigazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazateshĂ«m|gokigazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogazankerom|gogazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogazankeshĂ«|gogazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogazankeshĂ«m|gogazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogazankeya|gogazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazaterom|gazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazatemu|gazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gazateya|gazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazaterom|gokigazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazatemu|gokigazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigazateya|gokigazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gazazate|gazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gazazatesher|gazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazazatesherĂ«m|gazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazazatero|gazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gazazateshĂ«|gazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazazateshĂ«m|gazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazazatero|gokigazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigazazateshĂ«|gokigazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazazateshĂ«m|gokigazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogazazankerom|gogazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogazazankeshĂ«|gogazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogazazankeshĂ«m|gogazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogazazankeya|gogazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazazaterom|gazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazazatemu|gazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gazazateya|gazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazazaterom|gokigazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazazatemu|gokigazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigazazateya|gokigazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠte|gĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠtesher|gĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠtero|gĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠtero|gokigĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠterom|gĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠtemu|gĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠzĂŠteya|gĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠterom|gokigĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzĂŠteya|gokigĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafzafte|gafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafzaftesher|gafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzaftesherĂ«m|gafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafzaftero|gafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafzafteshĂ«|gafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzafteshĂ«m|gafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafzaftero|gokigafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafzafteshĂ«|gokigafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafzafteshĂ«m|gokigafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafzafnkerom|gogafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafzafnkeshĂ«|gogafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafzafnkeshĂ«m|gogafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafzafnkeya|gogafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafzafterom|gafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzaftemu|gafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafzafteya|gafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafzafterom|gokigafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafzaftemu|gokigafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafzafteya|gokigafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
